scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=1 electron ."
scripts.desktop:build: npm run db:generate && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run db:generate && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.desktop:build:mac:dmg: npm run db:generate && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.desktop:build:win: npm run db:generate && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.desktop:verify:prisma: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p1='dist-desktop/mac-arm64/Pet Retail CRM.app/Contents/Resources/app/node_modules/.prisma/client/schema.prisma';const p2='dist-desktop/mac-arm64/Pet Retail CRM.app/Contents/Resources/app/node_modules/@prisma/client/package.json';const ok1=fs.existsSync(p1);const ok2=fs.existsSync(p2);if(!ok1||!ok2){console.error('Prisma bundle check failed',{schema:ok1,client:ok2,p1,p2});process.exit(1);}console.log('Prisma bundle check passed');"
